data.title: 国际服活动常驻化「Schale's Happy ♥ Valentine Patrol」

data.body:
[Immortalized Event Notice]

The Event Story, 'Schale's Happy ♥ Valentine Patrol' has been immortalized today, so you can play it anytime!

Log in now to check it out, Sensei!
